# Bad Clinical Target Discovery Fixture

### Module: Drug target definition and good-target criteria
Priority: 必备
Core Exam Claim:
Drug targets should be useful in development.
Exam-Ready Knowledge Synthesis:
Drug target definition, criteria, GPCRs, target validation, and assay versus screen are compressed into one paragraph.
Evidence / Example Function:
GPCRs are examples.
Common Error / Trap:
On-target and off-target are mentioned here only.
Must Master:
- Remember the pipeline.
